headline: Beijing courts U.S. agribusiness as rural modernization takes center stage
summary: Investing.com -- China is calling on American corporations to deepen their involvement in its domestic agricultural sector, framing the country’s "rural revitalization" drive as a primary growth engine for foreign investment.
